walkthroughs.title: Welcome to Flow-State!
walkthroughs.description: Set up and customize Flow-State to protect yourself from burnout.

steps.title: Monitor Your Flow State
steps.description:
The Status Bar at the bottom right is the heart of this extension. It actively monitors your session. 

**Hover over it** at any time to reveal detailed session stats, including the **Code Complexity** score of your current file!

steps.title: Manage Developer Cognitive Load
steps.description: Flow-State monitors code complexity, reading time, and massive code insertions to prevent you from being overwhelmed.

steps.title: Protect Your Reviewers
steps.description: Analyze your staged Git files to ensure your pull requests won't cause reviewer fatigue.

steps.title: Activity & Context Switching
steps.description: Track your activity and monitor how often you switch tabs to help you stay focused.

steps.title: Stay Focused with Pomodoro
steps.description: Use the built-in Pomodoro timer to work in focused intervals and take regular breaks.

steps.title: Reduce Tab Clutter
steps.description: Identify inactive tabs and easily select which ones to close to keep your workspace clean.

steps.title: View Your Flow-State Dashboard
steps.description: Check your activity and cognitive load trends on your personal dashboard.

steps.title: Customize Your Experience
steps.description: Flow-State has a lot of features, but you don't have to use them all at once! Tailor it to fit your workflow.

flow-state.enableCognitiveLoadTracker.description: Master Switch: Enable the entire Developer Cognitive Load tracker.

flow-state.complexityThreshold.description: The maximum allowed cognitive complexity score per file before triggering a warning.

flow-state.enableReadWriteTracking.description: Enable Read-Write tracking (detects if you are stuck reading for a long time).

flow-state.readWriteTimeThresholdSeconds.description: Time in seconds without typing before triggering a 'Heavy Reading' warning.

flow-state.enableAddDeleteTracking.description: Enable Add-Delete ratio tracking (detects heavily deleting code).

flow-state.addDeleteRatioThreshold.description: Ratio of added to deleted characters before triggering a 'Stuck' warning.

flow-state.enableLargeInsertionTracking.description: Enable tracking for massive text insertions (like pasting AI-generated code).

flow-state.largeInsertionThresholdChars.description: Number of characters inserted at once that triggers a warning.

flow-state.enableReviewerLoadTracking.description: Master Switch: Enable tracking for Reviewer Cognitive Load (analyzes staged Git files).

flow-state.reviewerLocThreshold.description: The maximum number of modified Lines of Code (LOC) allowed in a PR before warning.

flow-state.contextSwitch.switchThreshold.description: Number of context switches before warning.

flow-state.contextSwitch.windowDuration.description: Time window for counting context switches (ms).

flowState.enableTabActivityTracker.description: Enable or disable the tab activity tracker feature.

flowState.warningTabActivityInterval.description: Time in ms between inactive tabs warnings.

flowState.tabActivityWarningThreshold.description: Number of inactive tabs before a warning is shown.

flow-state.enableSmartPomodoro.description: Enable dynamic adjustment of focus time based on cognitive load and code complexity.

flow-state.pomodoroFocusTimeMinutes.description: Duration of a focus session in minutes.

flow-state.pomodoroBreakTimeMinutes.description: Duration of a short break in minutes.

flow-state.pomodoroLongBreakTimeMinutes.description: Duration of a long break in minutes.

flow-state.cycleCount.description: Number of Pomodoro cycles before a long break.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
